question: Perform technical analysis on this stock including price trends, moving averages (50-day, 200-day), RSI, MACD, and support/resistance levels.
description: Perform technical analysis with indicators and chart patterns

evaluation_criteria.indicator_calculation_accuracy: Correct SMA, RSI, MACD, Bollinger calculations
evaluation_criteria.trend_identification: Valid trend analysis based on indicators
evaluation_criteria.pattern_recognition: Accurately identify chart patterns if present
evaluation_criteria.risk_management: Reasonable stop-loss and target price levels

test_data_note: Requires historical price data for indicator calculations

output_format.description: Return valid JSON with flat structure
